name: Death by Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Paint the outside of the ladyfingers with rum and place them flat side down around the sides and bottom of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Melt butter in a medium saucepan, remove from heat, and add chocolate chips. Stir until melted and cool slightly.
3. Beat egg yolks into the mixture one at a time until fully incorporated into the chocolate.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry peaks form.
5. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared springform pan and chill for at least 6 hours.
7. Whip heavy cream until thickened, then add sugar and vanilla. Continue whipping until very stiff.
8. Turn cake onto a serving platter, removing the pan sides and bottom so that ladyfingers are on top.
9. Spread whipped cream over the entire cake surface.
10. Pipe additional whipped cream decoratively around the cake as desired.
11. Melt remaining chocolate chips with vegetable oil in a double boiler until smooth.
12. Cool completely before drizzling sauce down the sides of the cake.
13. Garnish with candied cherries and store in the refrigerator.
Note: For longer storage, use stabilized whipped cream and add 1 teaspoon dissolved gelatin to the cake batter.
